title: CEP-0008 Semantic Envelope (v1 flat profile)
description: JSON Schema profile of CEP-0008's Semantic Envelope, scoped to the fields the v1 flat contract (sea.agent.event.v1.json) can carry. Field names are v1's own; see semantic-envelope.mapping.md for the CEP-0008 distinction each maps to and for the gap this profile does not close.

idempotency_key.description: Maps to CEP-0008 lineage_refs (SS7.1 Identity): distinguishes original from replayed envelope.

source.description: Maps to CEP-0008 source_system_refs (SS7.2 Recommended Identity).

event_type.description: Maps to CEP-0008 envelope_kind (SS9 Envelope Kinds).

correlation_id.description: Maps to CEP-0008 trace_refs / SS45 Trace Record envelope_refs.

causation_id.description: Maps to CEP-0008 SS45 Trace Record ordering_rule (which envelope caused this one).

payload.description: Opaque carrier for CEP-0008's states, transformations, questions, claims, evidence, and settlements sections (SS23-29). Structure is event_type-specific and not enforced by this profile.

provenance.description: Maps to CEP-0008 SS15 Envelope Provenance Record. Required here (stricter than v1's own optional field) because CEP-0008 SS15.2 treats an envelope without provenance as not settlement-valid.

metadata.description: Opaque carrier for CEP-0008 boundary_record, completeness_status, omission_status, and conformance_status (SS8, SS10, SS34, SS38). Not enforced by this profile; see semantic-envelope.mapping.md gap note.
